skill.name: stripe-go-live-workflow
skill.description: Operational workflow for taking a working test-mode Stripe integration to live AND for verifying an already-live integration end-to-end. Covers the Dashboard walkthrough, the never-see-the-live-key safety rule, the test-mode dry run, the live deploy ritual, and the Express/Node verify-the-pipes ritual.
skill.author: Hermes Agent
skill.maintainer_note: Battle-tested workflow. Has caught silent-201 and key-leak failure modes in real launches. The 'never see the live key' rule is non-negotiable.
